title: Fix inventory page: restore ability to add items and upload items

requirements.text: Restore full functionality of the Inventory page (InventoryPage.tsx) so that users can add new inventory items via the add dialog and upload items via Excel import — both of which are currently broken in Version 10.

quotes: ada eror pada inventori juga jadi gak bisa menambah barang maupun upload barang. mihon dikembalikan seperti sebelumnya

acceptanceCriteria: The 'Add Item' dialog opens and successfully submits a new inventory item without errors.
The Excel import/upload functionality works correctly and adds items to the inventory.
Existing inventory items are still displayed correctly.
No console errors appear when opening the inventory page, the add dialog, or triggering the upload flow.

constraints: Do not change any backend data models or Motoko logic unless strictly required to fix the inventory errors.
Preserve the cashier page improvements from Version 10 (max 20 products grid and color-differentiated product cards by item type).
nonGoals: Redesigning or restyling the inventory page.
Adding new inventory features beyond restoring existing functionality.
Modifying any other pages (Cashier, Transactions, Reports, Settings).
